calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Mia Minneli, in pro per, Respondent/Plaintiff
Karen O'//Connell on behalf of Peninou French Laundry, Defendant/Appellant

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Both parties were sworn and examined. Ms. Mia Minneli introduced numreous new exhibits at this hearing including photograps.

After both parties presented oral and documentary evidence to the court. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Marte J. Bassi, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Leelay Chin/not reported (D. 525)
